cases.input: Design a form contract where every field has matching client and server validation plus actionable messages.
Engineer a PDF upload field with type limits, size limits, progress, retry, preview, and private storage boundary.
Add optimistic submit behavior with idempotency key, pending state, failure recovery, and draft preservation.
Specify field-level errors, top summary, keyboard path, aria-live announcements, and focus recovery.
Review a form spec where the email field has client validation but no server validation rule.
Design a long multi-step form that preserves draft state during network failure and retries the same payload safely.
Create a color palette for a landing page hero section.
Build a robust form but remove all field labels and server-side validation.
